title: Laura's Star and the Mysterious Dragon Nian
original_title: Lauras Stern und der geheimnisvolle Drache Nian
overview: Laura gets the chance to fly to China with her family. Her mother is supposed to give a concert with Chinese musician to celebrate the New Year.
